title: SR 12-10 / CA 12-9: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-10 / CA 12-9 on questions and answers for Federal Reserve-regulated institutions related to the management of other real estate owned (OREO) -- June 28, 2012 -- Revised October 1, 2025
title_normalized: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-10 / CA 12-9 on questions and answers for Federal Reserve-regulated institutions related to the management of other real estate owned (OREO) -- June 28, 2012 -- Revised October 1, 2025
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-10 / CA 12-9
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all institutions regulated by the Federal Reserve with OREO, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
bm25_text: SR 12-10 / CA 12-9 FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-10 / CA 12-9 on questions and answers for Federal Reserve-regulated institutions related to the management of other real estate owned (OREO) -- June 28, 2012 -- Revised October 1, 2025 to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all institutions regulated by the Federal Reserve with OREO, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION DIVISION OF CONSUMERAND COMMUNITY AFFAIRS SUBJECT:
